title: Predicting the SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs — With Dick Costolo
summary: Dick Costolo, ex-CEO of Twitter, discusses potential IPO timelines and prospects for SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic. The conversation covers IPO mechanics, how these AI companies differ as platforms, and factors that could affect their public market success.
